title: Remove Industry Growth from inputs, share links, and Actual Value output

requirements.summary: Remove the Industry Growth field from the Company Snapshot form and from the inputs presets/model so it is no longer viewable/editable anywhere in the UI.
acceptanceCriteria: The Company Snapshot form no longer renders an input labeled "Industry Growth (%)".
No validation error can reference the removed Industry Growth field.
The example and default input sets no longer include an Industry Growth value in the UI.

file_operations.description: Remove the "Industry Growth (%)" input block (label, input, and field error rendering) and any associated parsing/formatting usage for the removed field.
Remove the industryGrowth property from the DcfInputs interface and remove it from DEFAULT_INPUTS and EXAMPLE_INPUTS so the app compiles and the UI presets no longer include it.
Remove the industryGrowth validation rule so no validation message can reference the removed field.

requirements.summary: Remove Industry Growth from URL query parameter encoding and make decoding safely ignore legacy indGrowth links.
acceptanceCriteria: Newly generated shareable links do not include the industry growth query parameter (currently named "indGrowth").
If a user opens an older link that contains "indGrowth", the app still loads successfully and ignores that value (or safely defaults it) without runtime errors.

file_operations.description: Update query string sync to (1) stop encoding "indGrowth" in encodeInputsToQuery, (2) stop decoding it into inputs in parseInputsFromQuery (ignore if present), and (3) update the comment/docs for the naming convention to remove indGrowth.

requirements.summary: Remove Industry Growth from Actual Value calculation and all Output Values UI copy/formulas so results no longer mention or depend on Industry Growth.
acceptanceCriteria: The "Actual Value" button subtitle no longer mentions Growth (e.g., it reflects "Capital + Assets ÷ Shares" or equivalent).
The "Actual Value Per Share" description no longer mentions "Industry Growth".
The Actual Value calculation no longer depends on an Industry Growth input value; the app builds and runs with the Industry Growth field removed from the inputs model.
No part of the results UI displays a value labeled or derived from "Industry Growth".

file_operations.description: Remove industryGrowth from the HiddenCalculations contract and from calculateHiddenValues: eliminate the industryGrowth-dependent intermediate computations and update Total Market Cap to be computed from Initial capital return + asset (without any growth term), ensuring outputs still compute with the updated DcfInputs type.

Update the Actual Value computation to use the revised calculations output (no growth-derived values) and update all Output Values UI copy/formulas/descriptions to remove references to Growth/Industry Growth (button subtitle and card description).
